vocab.example: I once stumbled upon a small gallery showcasing avant-garde sculptures that challenged my perception of traditional form.

vocab.meaning: một trải nghiệm đa giác quan
vocab.example: Modern art galleries often strive to create a sensory experience by combining visual art with immersive soundscapes.

vocab.meaning: sự bậc thầy về nghệ thuật/kỹ năng điêu luyện
vocab.example: I was utterly captivated by the artistic mastery displayed in the oil paintings from the Renaissance era.

vocab.meaning: khả năng hiểu và phân tích hình ảnh/nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Visiting art galleries frequently has helped me develop my visual literacy and appreciate subtle nuances in composition.
The gallery featured several contemporary masterpieces that reflected the complexities of 21st-century life.

vocab.meaning: những nét vẽ/kỹ thuật sử dụng cọ ngoạn mục
vocab.example: The artist's breathtaking brushwork gave the landscape a sense of motion that felt incredibly lifelike.

vocab.meaning: gợi suy nghĩ/kích thích tư duy
vocab.example: It was a thought-provoking exhibition that dealt with environmental themes through recycled materials.
Walking into the main hall, I was struck by the monumental scale of the murals covering the walls.
The minimalist photography gallery managed to evoke a sense of profound solitude and peace.
The national gallery serves as a vital repository for our country’s rich cultural heritage.
